case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MAXUMAN CHENIER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-20-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST MICHAEL R. LEA, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-11-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-26-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR # 2031 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
